message:
refactor,test(discovery): simplify cache metadata and consolidate test suite

Simplify cache_metadata() by removing redundant max-age clamping logic
(reduced from 17 to 5 lines). Consolidate test fixtures: update connector
IDs and operations, remove redundant rate-limit test case, update health
filter constant from Available to Healthy.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
